calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 A.M. On May 12, 2003
Off Calendar May-13-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, and CSR: Patricia Dowling.
Appearances: Douglas Holloway, Esq. For Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corp. also present.
Defendants not present.
Plaintiff witness, Ernest Knowles, V.P., was sworn and examined.
EXH. 1 - Lease agreement ---------ID/EVID.
EXH. 2-10 - Lease schedules------ID/EVID.
EXH. 11 - Personal guaranty-------ID/EVID.
The Court hears evidence and grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants, Johnson Paint & Body, Inc. Dba Pro Collision; Danny Ferguson. as follows:
Principal amount of $48,532.46, Interest $1,170.40, Costs $324.50, Attorney fee $2,500.00. For the total of $52,527.36
Plaintiff is also entitled for immediate possession of the leased equipment as stated in the judgment (see scanned documents), defendant shall receive all credits to which they are entitled by law.
Does 1-10 are dismissed without prejudice.
Counsel stipulated for return of the exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.
